# openai_organization_group_role (Resource)

Assigns a role to a group at the organization level.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Assign an organization role to a group
resource "openai_organization_group_role" "eng_billing" {
  group_id = var.group_id
  role_id  = var.role_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) The ID of the group.
- `role_id` (String) The ID of the role to assign.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The identifier of the organization group role assignment (group_id:role_id).
